opportunity.title: Bridge retail media offsite
opportunity.thesis: Retail media pulls brand dollars. Kargo should activate shopper audiences offsite.
opportunity.whyItMatters: Public Criteo ARR and RMN offsite deals show where budgets are going.
opportunity.move: Partner 1–2 RMNs for high-impact offsite; skip rebuilding onsite retail.
opportunity.expectedImpact: Capture brand spend leaving pure open web.

evidence.title: Criteo patent: “Shopper graph linking in-store and open-web events”
evidence.summary: IP filing reinforces Criteo’s commerce identity graph; highlights an opportunity for Kargo to bridge retail audiences into high-impact offsite creative.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Methods for linking hashed transaction identifiers with anonymized open-web engagement events for bid-time audience resolution…

evidence.title: Criteo Q2: Retail Media ARR up 18% YoY
evidence.summary: Hard financial evidence of retail media pull; validates adjacent category growth that Kargo should address or partner into.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Retail Media net revenue increased 18% year over year, driven by onsite and offsite commerce media…

evidence.title: Walmart Connect + Criteo expand offsite retail media inventory
evidence.summary: Partnership deepens offsite commerce media—another pull of brand budgets toward closed retail graphs.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Walmart Connect advertisers can activate shopper audiences across Criteo’s offsite network with unified reporting…

evidence.title: Amazon Ads case study: AMC + streaming TV drives 22% ROAS lift
evidence.summary: Published outcome claims strengthen Amazon’s closed-loop narrative; brands may consolidate spend inside AMC-measured environments.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Using AMC audiences activated across streaming TV and sponsored display, the brand reported a 22% ROAS lift…

competitors.name: Criteo
competitors.summary: Pivoted hard into retail media and commerce audiences; strong first-party graph, weaker brand creative story.

competitors.name: Amazon Ads
competitors.summary: Retail media gravity well; AMC and streaming TV expand Amazon from shelf to living room.

learnings.title: Retail media is pulling brand dollars
learnings.lesson: Public ARR growth + Walmart offsite deals show commerce graph gravity.
learnings.quickWin: Partner one RMN for offsite high-impact; don’t rebuild onsite retail.

confidenceBreakdown.note: Public sources only. Confidence = corroboration across independent marked sources.
